scenarios.title: Protein Structure Prediction and Design Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: AlphaFold, ColabFold, Boltz, Chai-1, ESM, ProteinMPNN, RFdiffusion, MSA generation, structure prediction outputs, protein backbone generation, binder design, and sequence design.
scenarios.role: Use `alphafold3` for AlphaFold 3 input preparation, prediction command planning, output interpretation, and Python API inspection. Covers the local AlphaFold 3 inference package, its JSON dialect, run_alphafold workflow, outputs.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `alphafold3` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: input preparation, output interpretation, python apis, and running predictions.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `alphafold3` when the request names `alphafold3`, centers on AlphaFold 3 input preparation, prediction command planning, output interpretation, and Python API inspection. Covers the local AlphaFold 3 inference package, its JSON dialect, run_alphafold workflow, outputs, troubleshooting, and safe helper scripts, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in protein structure prediction and design workflows. Then route to input preparation, output interpretation, python APIs, or running predictions when those focused workflows match.
